target.name: compileJava
target.depends: java.compile.testAnnotatedType, java.compile.testOverridingType, java.compile.testOverridingRule, java.compile.testWrappedType, java.compile.testPrimitiveType, java.compile.testSubtypingA, java.compile.testSubtypingB, java.compile.testSubstituteType, java.compile.testSubtypingTest, java.compile.jetbrains.mps.baseLanguage.closures.test, java.compile.tests.testDepViewer, java.compile.tests.testPersistence, java.compile.CloneModule.test, java.compile.JavaCompilationXmlConflict.test, java.compile.refactoring.test, java.compile.mps.test.findusages
